records.question: Which performances at Verizon Center on February 7 hosted by the Pittsburgh Penguins had an attendance of at least 1877?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT performance.performance_id FROM performance
WHERE performance.attendance >= 1877 AND performance.location = 'Verizon Center' AND performance.host = 'Pittsburgh Penguins' AND performance.date = 'February 7'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT performance.Performance_ID
FROM performance
WHERE Location = 'Verizon Center'
  AND Date = 'February 7'
  AND Host = 'Pittsburgh Penguins'
  AND Attendance >= 1877
